texto: The folktale world is oriented positively toward its protagonist; a folktale is defined by the hero's triumph: magic weapons and helpers are, with the necessary narrative retardation, at his beck and call.
explicacao: Citação de Darko Suvin sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The folktale world is oriented positively toward its protagonist; a folktale is defined by the he…” articula reflexao, science-fiction, folktale em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
